title: The Tales of Old
description: Relive the untold stories of the past. Fills your Minecraft world with books and history to make it feel 'lived in'. Let's fill up those beautiful new chiseled bookshelves!
body:
### Embrace the untold stories of the past in this Minecraft Fabric Mod.


Minecraft is a lot more Lore-filled than one might think.
Enjoy the stories of an Ancient World presented in this Mod.

The Mod features an Interpretation of the Lore based on the Games.
It actively excludes the books from the consideration,
as they include some questionable decisions that don't seem to be reflected in-game.



The mod adds writings of the people that built the structures already in the game
to flesh out the story.
Play through the entire game to relive the downfall of a great civilisation!

Please enable the Bonus Chest when playing this mod.



This mod is made for the Fabric Mod Loader,
a Forge version is not planned.
If you are new to modding, watch this video to get started.

This mod will need the Fabric API mod to work.
